title: OP Mainnet records ‘largest TVL event’ in its history as crypto card provider Etherfi goes live
message_html: OP Mainnet records ‘largest TVL event’ in its history as crypto card provider Etherfi goes live ...
snippet: Crypto credit cards see roughly 100,000 average daily transactions, with Etherfi accounting for about a third of that volume.

title: Brix raises $5.5 million to tokenize emerging market assets, plans debut on MegaETH
message_html: Brix raises $5.5 million to tokenize emerging market assets, plans debut on MegaETH ...
snippet: Brix plans to bring emerging market assets onchain, launching a Turkish lira-backed token as its first product on MegaETH.

title: Societe Generale Teams With Consensys to Expand Stablecoin Access
message_html: Societe Generale Teams With Consensys to Expand Stablecoin Access ...
snippet: French bank Societe Generale is expanding access to its dollar-denominated stablecoin. title: Morning Minute: The Next Fed Chair Has a Crypto Portfolio
message_html: Morning Minute: The Next Fed Chair Has a Crypto Portfolio ...
snippet: Kevin Warsh is holding Solana, Polymarket and more. Goldman Sachs is filing for a BTC ETF. And Circle stock is jumping on news of a token.
